topic: title authors journal year and DOI
reason: Required CC BY attribution and stable source identity; not a scientific outcome.

topic: preliminary 36-test two-rope two-hitch study
reason: Core study identity and scope.

topic: occupational arborist context
reason: Needed to prevent transfer to unrelated rope domains; broad industry rhetoric omitted.

topic: legislation certification and standards assertions
reason: Outside the experimental result and unsafe to universalize across jurisdictions.

topic: lists and operational descriptions of other hitches and ascent methods
reason: Not tested and could become unsupported technique instruction.

topic: purpose was not to define best knot
reason: Essential anti-ranking boundary stated by authors.

topic: Axis 11 mm polyester-polyamide specimen
reason: Exact experimental factor retained; manufacturer and promotional description omitted.

topic: XTC 16 nominal 13 mm polyamide specimen
reason: Exact experimental factor retained; source's later 12.7 mm wording discrepancy noted.

topic: 8 mm polyester-Technora hitch cord
reason: Necessary to describe the tested systems without supplier identity.

topic: manufacturers catalog breaking loads masses and promotional properties
reason: Not experimental outcomes and could be mistaken for tested-system safety ratings or endorsements.

topic: Prusik and Valdotain tresse factors
reason: The two exact tested hitch levels are required.

topic: AP AT XP and XT treatment matrix
reason: Preserves the balanced two-by-two design.

topic: nine runs per treatment and 36 total
reason: Core replication count.

topic: three rope pieces three cords and three repeated tests
reason: Prevents nine runs from being misdescribed as nine independently sourced complete systems.

topic: slow-pull semi-static traction bench
reason: Defines the quasi-static evidence window.

topic: machine connector plate and camera brands
reason: Trademarks and promotional product detail add no durable result knowledge.

topic: modified standardized test method
reason: Critical limitation retained without standards body, number, or compliance implication.

topic: terminal knot connector layout pre-tension and reset procedure
reason: Operational construction and loading recipe is unnecessary and potentially unsafe.

topic: 250 mm stroke and six displacement observations
reason: Necessary to bound the short-stroke result.

topic: load slip and diameter-change measurements
reason: Core measured outcomes.

topic: start-end near-hitch thermal measurement
reason: Requested temperature outcome with endpoint limitation.

topic: ambient temperature and humidity measurement
reason: Retained as experimental context, not a field environmental rule.

topic: distribution and variance checks plus one-factor temperature analysis
reason: Preserves analytical design without software trademark.

topic: factorial multivariate analysis rope hitch and interaction
reason: Core factor-effect analysis.

topic: post-hoc family-wise confidence and p threshold
reason: Needed to interpret significance claims.

topic: separate and multiple regressions
reason: Requested statistical relationships.

topic: 18.7 kN 9.6 cm and 3 mm observed extrema
reason: Study results retained only with explicit no-rating language.

topic: end-stroke mean loads by treatment
reason: Clarifies comparative result and difference from individual maximum.

topic: end-stroke slip observations
reason: Descriptive comparison retained, not a permissible-slip threshold.

topic: end-stroke diameter-change observations
reason: Descriptive comparison retained, not a retirement threshold.

topic: hitch significant effect on load and slip
reason: Primary comparative finding.

topic: rope significant effect on diameter deformation
reason: Primary comparative finding.

topic: greater Prusik grip higher load lower slip and greater deformation coupling
reason: Coupled pattern retained with explicit no-better-or-safer interpretation.

topic: rope model bundles material diameter and construction
reason: Prevents causal attribution to one correlated specimen property.

topic: adjusted R-squared values for separate and combined models
reason: Requested statistical relationship strength.

topic: full regression coefficients and equations
reason: Could invite unsafe extrapolation as a load calculator; relationship form and fit are sufficient.

topic: temperature changes and nonsignificant treatment comparison
reason: Requested measurement and null-comparison interpretation.

topic: ambient ranges and nonsignificant analysis
reason: Retained without turning one laboratory range into a performance envelope.

topic: literature-derived generic knot strength percentages and ascender results
reason: Third-party claims were not separately rights-reviewed or produced by this experiment.

topic: environmental aging and material variability
reason: Retained only as untested transfer limitations identified in discussion.

topic: not applicable as assurance in dynamic event
reason: Essential author-supplied transfer boundary.

topic: future falling-body and cyclic testing
reason: Makes untested dynamic and hysteresis domains explicit.

topic: preliminary study needs more ropes knots and samples
reason: Prominent scope limitation.

topic: both tested knots possible with both tested ropes
reason: Not converted into field suitability or life-support advice given short-stroke preliminary method.

topic: best-knot equipment-choice and regulatory implications
reason: No-best-knot purpose retained; choice and regulatory recommendations excluded.

topic: natural-fiber rope transfer
reason: No natural-fiber rope was tested.

topic: bondage shibari kinbaku and human-suspension transfer
reason: Study was synthetic arborist bench testing with no human body or recreational suspension.

topic: safe working loads factors ratings and recommendations
reason: Observed short-stroke values cannot provide design or safety ratings.

topic: diagrams photographs charts logos and icons
reason: Parent scope requires no images; numerical relationships were manually paraphrased from article text and tables.

topic: source table layouts
reason: Layouts omitted; only essential study factors and results manually rewritten.

topic: third-party papers standards books and web resources
reason: Not accessed or separately rights-cleared; literature examples not treated as this study's findings.

topic: CC BY attribution link changes and no endorsement
reason: Required rights metadata; legal-code prose excluded from scientific training content.

topic: manufacturer and instrument trademarks
reason: Model labels Axis and XTC 16 are minimally retained to identify experimental factors; all suppliers and instrument promotions omitted.

topic: raw PDF browser HTML and normalized extraction
reason: Only manually transformed Markdown is direct training content.

topic: DOI digits URL and redirect recall
reason: Identity metadata supports provenance but is not a knowledge question.

topic: document-disjoint split rule
reason: All source and derived items must remain in one split to prevent leakage.
